hero.title: Build. Launch. Grow. Everything your digital business needs
hero.subtitle: Websites, apps, and digital marketing that level up your business.

ourStory.mainTextPart1: Since 2017, ON DM has been a trusted digital solutions agency serving Egypt, Saudi Arabia, and the UAE.
ourStory.mainTextPart2: We use the latest strategies and data-driven insights to help businesses build a strong online presence, create impactful content, and run marketing campaigns that deliver real results.
ourStory.mainTextPart3: Whether your goal is to grow your brand, boost sales, or improve customer experience, our expert team turns your dream into success.
ourStory.tagline: ON DM more than digital solutions agency

servicesIntro.title: Everything your brand needs in one place!
servicesIntro.description: From first ideas to real results, we help businesses create a clear digital presence, reach more people, and move forward with confidence.

workIntro.title: A full-cycle support
workIntro.description: From design and development to marketing and operations management, built to transform the online learning experience.

clients.title: Businesses that chose to grow with us
clients.description: Each project is a partnership built on trust and results. We’re proud to work with companies from different fields who believe in our work.

features.heading: We're a mission driven company
features.subheading: Powerful, self-serve product and growth analytics to help you convert, engage, and retain more users. Trusted by over 4,000 startups.

feature1.title: Share team inboxes
feature1.description: Whether you have a team of 2 or 200, our shared team inboxes keep everyone on the same page and in the loop.
feature1.item2: Always give customers a human to chat to
feature1.item3: Automate customer support and close leads faster

feature2.title: Deliver instant answers
feature2.description: An all-in-one customer service platform that helps you balance everything your customers need to be happy.
feature2.item1: Keep your customers in the loop with live chat
feature2.item2: Embed help articles right on your website
feature2.item3: Customers never have to leave the page to find an answer

feature3.title: Manage your team with reports
feature3.description: Measure what matters with Untitled's easy-to-use reports. You can filter, export, and drilldown on the data in a couple clicks.
feature3.item1: Filter, export, and drilldown on the data quickly
feature3.item2: Save, schedule, and automate reports to your inbox
feature3.item3: Connect the tools you already use with 100+ integrations

team.heading: Meet our team
team.subheading: Our philosophy is simple—hire a team of diverse, passionate people and foster a culture that empowers you to do your best work.
